plugin.name: YouTubeMusic
plugin.title: YouTube Music
plugin.desc: Browse, search, and stream YouTube Music to your Squeezebox players.
plugin.changes: Fixed piCorePlayer audio cutting out after 3 seconds — FLAC is now used as the fallback codec instead of AAC (FLAC is universally supported by Squeezebox hardware). Fixed yt-dlp updater to use yt-dlp -U first (works without pip on piCorePlayer), falling back to pip on standard installs.
plugin.creator: schmij97
